-- bsip_beenleightmc → customer 101 (Beenleigh Road Medical Practice) - best match
-- bsip_staffcitydoc → customer 396 (Stafford City Doctors) - exact match

UPDATE phone_numbers
SET customerExternalId = '101', customerName = 'Beenleigh Road Medical Practice'
WHERE provider = 'Channel Haus' AND providerServiceCode = 'bsip_beenleightmc';

UPDATE phone_numbers
SET customerExternalId = '396', customerName = 'Stafford City Doctors'
WHERE provider = 'Channel Haus' AND providerServiceCode = 'bsip_staffcitydoc';
